description: A domain-agnostic customer support ticket used to record an issue raised between parties — its category, priority, lifecycle status, supporting attachments, and support interaction sessions. It is independent of any particular domain; domain-specific values are carried via the category descriptor and the extensible attribute bags.
title: SupportCase

category.description: The category of the issue, expressed as a Descriptor whose code is defined by the domain (e.g. SHIPMENT_LOST, BILLING_DISPUTE, SERVICE_QUALITY).

priority.description: Priority of the support case. Suggested values are P1, P2, P3; custom string values are also allowed.

status.description: The lifecycle state of the support case expressed as a Descriptor whose code MUST be one of the standard values.

raisedBy.description: Identifier of the party who raised the support case.

assignedAgent.description: Identifier of the support agent the case is assigned to.

attachments.description: Supporting attachments / evidence for the case — documents, images, or other artifacts, distinguished by mimeType.

sessions.description: Support interaction sessions associated with this case. Each session records the channel used and any media exchanged.

supportChannel.description: The channel over which this session took place.

data.description: Media captured or exchanged during the session.

claimAmount.description: Amount claimed in relation to this case, if any.

resolution.description: Resolution details, once the case is resolved.

createdAt.description: Timestamp at which the case was created.

resolvedAt.description: Timestamp at which the case was resolved.
